items.claim: Paddy Pimblett will win his upcoming fight.
items.quote: I think that Patty the Batty wins.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez has a high-level physique.
Conor McGregor is capable of landing big shots against Max Holloway.
items.quote: Max Holloway is a threat, but I think McGregor can definitely land some big shots.

items.claim: Bo Nickal has only lost one fight in his career.
Gable Steveson is a high-level athlete due to his Olympic gold medal background.
items.quote: Gable's a different athlete though. Olympic gold.
